name: onedollarstats
description: A lightweight, zero-dependency analytics tracker for frontend apps

scripts.test:e2e: vitest run --project 'Script E2E Tests' --project 'Package E2E Tests'
scripts.test:build&e2e:script: pnpm bundle:test && FORCE_BUILD=1 COPY_TRACKER=1 vitest run --project 'Script E2E Tests'
scripts.test:build&e2e:package: pnpm build && FORCE_BUILD=1 COPY_PACKAGE=1 vitest run --project 'Package E2E Tests'
scripts.test:all: pnpm bundle:test && pnpm build && FORCE_BUILD=1 COPY_TRACKER=1 COPY_PACKAGE=1 vitest run

simple-git-hooks.pre-commit: if [ "$(git branch --show-current)" = "master" ]; then pnpm bundle && pnpm test:all; fi
